name: Addisu Demissie
subject: We need your help with debate prep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I know it's hard to believe, but it's already time for Cory to start preparing for the next DNC debate -- and we need your help. **I 'll get straight to the point, team. Cory wants your input on what issues matter the most. [Can you take two minutes to fill out our debate stage priority survey? This is the most effective way to have your thoughts shared directly with Cory himself.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_fr_20190820_ASD_20190820-fr-ASD-debateprep-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_fr_20190820_ASD_20190820-fr-ASD-debateprep-actives_actives_button1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Cory's been on the trail for over six months -- talking to folks about what matters to them, hearing stories and ideas, and bringing their priorities to the forefront of this campaign. We've heard from people about the need to discuss the existential threat of climate change and how we're going to address it as a country. And we've heard how we must combat white supremacy, implement sensible gun control measures, and stand up for reproductive rights. **[But this is only the start. We want to hear directly from you, team. What issues do you most want to hear about in the next debate?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_fr_20190820_ASD_20190820-fr-ASD-debateprep-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory's made it clear from the beginning: this is a grassroots campaign where everyone deserves to have their voice heard. These moments are a major opportunity for an underdog campaign like ours and this grassroots team always makes the most of it. We're eager to read through your ideas and share them with the boss. When Cory steps onto that stage in a few weeks, I want him to be ready -- and with your help, he will be. Thank you,
Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_fr_20190820_ASD_20190820-fr-ASD-debateprep-actives_actives_button2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0896/5fca0d19/70ad201e/29190347/4107372513/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0896/5fca0d19/70ad201e/29190346/4107372513/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0896/5fca0d19/70ad201e/29190345/4107372513/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0896/5fca0d19/70ad201e/29190344/4107372513/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0896/5fca0d19/70ad201e/29190343/4107372513/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0896/5fca0d19/70ad201e/29190347/4107372513/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Yang2020.com
subject: Joe Biden, Kirsten Gillibrand, Tom Steyer, John Delaney, Seth Moulton, Tulsi Gabbard, Kamala Harris, and now Julian Castro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
With Andrew gaining momentum -- the latest Fox News poll has him in a tie for 5th -- this is a perilous time for the campaign. We have a plan to more than double our Iowa organizing staff in the next month.
| | | |
---
| Friend --
---
| Already, Joe Biden, Kirsten Gillibrand, Tom Steyer, John Delaney, Kamala Harris, Seth Moulton, Tulsi Gabbard, and now Julian Castro have bought air time in Iowa.

With Andrew gaining momentum -- the latest Fox News poll has him in a tie for 5th -- this is a perilous time for the campaign. **If we let the other campaigns use their money to drown out Andrew’s important message, we could fall behind before the important fall debates.

[We have a plan to more than double our Iowa organizing staff in the next month -- but to do that we need to raise $175,000 to fully fund our program through the caucuses. clean_body: With Andrew gaining momentum -- the latest Fox News poll has him in a tie for 5th -- this is a perilous time for the campaign. We have a plan to more than double our Iowa organizing staff in the next month. | | | | | Friend -- | Already, Joe Biden, Kirsten Gillibrand, Tom Steyer, John Delaney, Kamala Harris, Seth Moulton, Tulsi Gabbard, and now Julian Castro have bought air time in Iowa. With Andrew gaining momentum -- the latest Fox News poll has him in a tie for 5th -- this is a perilous time for the campaign. If we let the other campaigns use their money to drown out Andrew’s important message, we could fall behind before the important fall debates. | | Now’s the time for this team to go all-in. We have the momentum, we’re polling higher than ever, and we know when people hear why it’s so important to act on automation and our changing economy they are moving to support Andrew. What’s missing? Our ability to match their organizing on the ground. That’s where you come in: | Let's do this, \- Yang2020 | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. | | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

subject: Important -- Trump is in Louisville

body:
Have you heard?
|
---

| | Peter,

Have you heard? Matt Bevin is bringing in President Trump this afternoon for a closed-door, high-dollar fundraiser to try to prop up Bevin's flailing re-election campaign.

Matt Bevin is the most unpopular governor in the country. Just this week he escalated his feud with his own lieutenant governor and once again lashed out at Kentucky's teachers. He can't seem to get along with anyone in Kentucky -- and he certainly can't run on his own failed record.

So Matt Bevin's only play is to try to hide behind the President and count on big money, out-of-state backers like the Koch brothers to bail him out.

We're counting on our grassroots team of supporters to help us make sure we can compete with Bevin's big spending. **Help show the real energy on the ground for Andy and Jacqueline. Will you pitch in today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Derek, We need all hands on deck to support our nominee, Michael Vose, in the Epping Special Election. He's going to face off against failed D.C. insider Naomi Andrews in October - and we need to defeat her. That begins with you. Your donation will be earmarked for us to fulfill our special election budget - with your contribution, we'll be able to do mail, digital advertisement, and support our volunteers in the field knocking on doors. We cannot come up short in this special election. The Democrats and their 20+ out-of-state Presidential candidates are going to use Epping to organize their voters and train their volunteers. We must do the same. Michael is hitting the ground running and I want to tell him on Friday that we raised $5,000 for our Epping Victory Fund. I know, that if every dedicated New Hampshire Republican chipped in , we'd win big in Epping in October. The Democrats have shown time and time again this session that the State Legislature - and who we elect to it - matters. We have an opportunity to send a Republican to the State House and show the state momentum is on our side. Sincerely, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman P.S. - the General Election is on October 8th, and it's going to be here before we know it. MAKE YOUR SECURE CONTRIBUTION HERE: | Republican Party of New Hampshire · 10 Water Street · Concord · New Hampshire · 03301 |

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: Good news / Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello,

We have some good news and some not-so-good news.

**Good news first:** The majority of Massachusetts' Members of Congress are backing Ed Markey's re-election campaign, including Elizabeth Warren! Ed is proud to have the support of his colleagues who are dedicated to fighting for Massachusetts families.

**Okay, now for the bad news:** We were certain we would see a spike in our fundraising, but after crunching the numbers, we're already really behind our $25,000 goal.

_**[So all of us at Team Ed Markey are making this urgent request to you: Will you pitch in $27 or more to have Ed's back and keep him fighting for us in the Senate?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082119_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

President Trump and the RNC are raising mountains of right-wing cash. **They raised more than DOUBLE what Democrats raised last month!**

That money will make its way into Senate races like Ed's to fund relentless attacks.

That's why we're boosting our fundraising into overdrive this week and asking for your direct help.

_**[Will you pitch in $27 to support Ed and help us reach our $25,000 goal this week?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082119_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Andrew Yang
subject: My ask to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We’re building a coalition of people from all over the country who see the threats we’re facing and are ready to take immediate action to do something about it.

| | | |
---
| Friend --
---
| I want to tell you why I love this campaign.

**First: We have donors in over 87% of zip codes in America.** That’s incredible! We’re building a coalition of people from all over the country who see the threats we’re facing and are ready to take immediate action to do something about it.

**Second: Our campaign is built by people from all walks of life.** The most common jobs of our donors are software engineers, teachers, drivers, retail workers and warehouse workers.

**Third: This campaign is built by grassroots donors -- not corporate PACs or special interest billionaires.** When people look at our fundraising reports they see small donations make up a majority of our fundraising.

Now here’s where the math comes in. We still have another $109,673 to raise to fund our ramped up Iowa organizing program. Hitting this goal will allow us to more than DOUBLE our organizers in the state. That would be big.

So here’s my ask to you: Our average online donation this week is $32.03. If 3,424 people donate TONIGHT we can close the books on this goal and hire these organizers immediately. [I’m counting on you Yang Gang -- can you pitch in?](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQ02lV0-2B-2FAsZCh9lzrV5waF336SCiCpNhiC1bHSNpM7K24wPrRtQPIHkbyZNQl6Bs8dHFl7j8Wt4RTX2A7geyYo0FKTHJXrpFDlXqlEoK541GtOfjJpVTEUvWv0-2B8U4-2F7u7G9BN2vpzpNwbsibEIS1G2bE6m3i5rvA4pHeL-2B2SCsumy3BDLvlo8PLahranSBstMrgXV3ED0ycE1H1bgF707K5VeZnvcn3pv1P8BdcfggW2IELyOvnKf5VpZKd7LsAAC7CDOPcVxwGRxWQdWUMxhyyhL939Ip5YKiIBrEZXXzvhvhkaDlrkhICALoBS3joVdQ71NXwgNTRFEHdJp2KoSwO4NztXJpEhV4w8GKQgFywuytW3pOnuicQRXjkYKAM-2Bw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2FQLasw6tRc7XrcxcQ68riYxiA-2F5sOfal9G6-2F19ufiRJC6qRIrdrXyNlamJlBhmeXA3Ua2-2FNPuaCoBHezHqNgQMxIKsPpmI4WZV-2FFPwfK1aq5YDsQQbO98-2FQR2GFo-2FY2IAY7mhlzJqYbM5deMnEvsahwaO4tQPClxtXtDvZeEYbSMPH0bqMIL9mrRH4SFp-2FM2zLzwYQDRb6VUMADzNxIeR-2BkGQbGq7hrknKRBGP-2Fkoc2WB2RZzVq4iKgbjCL9t7-2BPmIH0M6M8XxLFEGxwRV-2BHObGUbFkDNKaU3l-2FjwXpqxn9sl8li59fEMDyxbRfHl79XXYT1CXlI22Ob-2FVaaUUqm7Vg-3D-3D)

clean_body: We’re building a coalition of people from all over the country who see the threats we’re facing and are ready to take immediate action to do something about it. | | | | | Friend -- | I want to tell you why I love this campaign. First: We have donors in over 87% of zip codes in America. That’s incredible! We’re building a coalition of people from all over the country who see the threats we’re facing and are ready to take immediate action to do something about it. Second: Our campaign is built by people from all walks of life. The most common jobs of our donors are software engineers, teachers, drivers, retail workers and warehouse workers. Third: This campaign is built by grassroots donors -- not corporate PACs or special interest billionaires. When people look at our fundraising reports they see small donations make up a majority of our fundraising. Now here’s where the math comes in. We still have another $109,673 to raise to fund our ramped up Iowa organizing program. Hitting this goal will allow us to more than DOUBLE our organizers in the state. That would be big. So here’s my ask to you: Our average online donation this week is $32.03. If 3,424 people donate TONIGHT we can close the books on this goal and hire these organizers immediately. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for everything! \- Andrew Yang | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. | | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Andrea
subject: yesterday's message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Hey, folks!

I just read yesterday's email from our finance and debate prep teams -- I love seeing different parts of our campaign work together for one goal!

Our all-hands-on-deck approach is working, and our rising poll numbers are proof -- but we need that extra push to secure the 2% in four polls we need to qualify for September's debates.

This is what our campaign is all about: joining forces to fight for a new and better way. Will you join forces with us?

[**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/Houston**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomHouston&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1")

**Begin Forwarded Message:**

> Team,
>
> Our debate prep and finance teams have been working together because Tim won't make it to the stage in Houston unless we pick up our numbers and get him the grassroots momentum he needs to qualify! [ **According to DNC rules, we need to get at least 2% in four nationwide polls to make it to the debate.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-++According+to+DNC+rules+we+need+to+get+a&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1")
>
> [**Can you help us with that? Every dollar amplifies our message and helps raise our profile for these polls.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+help+us+with+that+Every+dollar+a&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1")
>
> Tim's been listening closely to folks around the country, learning what **you want to hear.** Our platform is inspired by you!
>
> [**If you want to see your ideas and direction for the country discussed on the national debate stage, then you should contribute to make sure we send Tim to Houston.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+If+you+want+to+see+your+ideas+and+direct&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1")
>
> Tim knows what the American people want because he listens to our concerns -- and he'll make sure the rest of the Democratic candidates know, too.
>
> [GET TIM TO HOUSTON](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+GET+TIM+TO+HOUSTON&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_1_1")
> Let's work together to get this done!
>
> Everyone on the Debate Prep & Finance Teams

|
---

name: Official Bennet Campaign HQ
subject: [BREAKING] → James Carville on the record!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Friends, James Carville just said what more and more voters are thinking: [**Michael is the best candidate to beat Donald Trump.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac76/134673f2/cdec270/699641dd/1816712993/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac76/134673f2/cdec270/699641dc/1816712993/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081819_AC_LD&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
That's huge! The architect behind the successful 1992 Clinton presidential campaign believes Michael has what it takes to be President of the United States.

It's not just Carville. As Michael crisscrosses the country, people are sitting up and taking notice.

[**People are tired of Donald Trump 's chaos.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac76/134673f2/cdec270/699641dd/1816712993/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

They're looking for a steady hand who will fix our broken politics and level the economic playing field for American families.

[**But, Friends, we URGENTLY need your help so we can capitalize on this momentum. name: Mark Warner
subject: Will you take my hate crimes survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We have a serious and growing problem in our country. Over the past several years, we have seen an alarming increase in the number of hate crimes across the nation.
|
---
| | | **Hate Crimes Survey**

_Hate crimes are on the rise across the country. Will you take my survey to let me know what you think we should do to stop this disturbing trend?_

****[TAKE MARK'S SURVEY](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d140/53d9897e/512acd78/1c8e5db5/560043337/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-nohate-sl3")****
---
Derek,

We have a serious and growing problem in our country. Over the past several years, we have seen an alarming increase in the number of hate crimes across the nation. It's despicable -- and too often, these hate crimes go unreported and there aren't enough resources to help the victims.

That's why I've joined my Senate colleagues in introducing the **_NO HATE Act_**. It's a bipartisan piece of legislation that would do a lot to help combat the recent surge in hate crimes, including:
* **Improving reporting of hate crimes** by allowing law enforcement to report detailed information about them to the FBI
* **Encouraging law enforcement training** so that officers know how to identify and address hate crimes
* **Helping states establish hotlines** to collect information about hate crimes and direct victims and witnesses to law enforcement and support services
* **Allowing judges to require community service or education** for individuals convicted under federal hate crimes laws

We owe it to the victims of hate crimes everywhere to do everything we can to stamp out the voices of hatred that have been promoting violence against Jews, Muslims, immigrants, the LGBTQ community, and other vulnerable Americans. The _NO HATE Act_ is an important step toward that goal.

**[But I want to hear from you, too. Will you take my survey and let me know what you think about the recent surge in hate crimes, and what we should do to stop it?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d140/53d9897e/512acd78/1c8e5db5/560043337/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-nohate-sl3")**

Thanks,
Mark

** **
** **
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d140/53d9897e/512acd78/1c8e5db4/560043337/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20190821db__180__&refcode2=cont_SL3&amount=5")****
---
** **
** **
** **

|

Williamsburg, VA 23185

subject: Top 5 Reasons YOU Should Attend our G.O.Party!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It's time to RSVP for Team Holcomb's Annual G.O.Party! This exciting event will take place Wednesday, August 28th at the Dallara IndyCar Factory...... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/top-5-reasons-you-should-attend-our-goparty?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d1491df9bc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | **Top 5 Reasons You Should Attend Team Holcomb's
G.O.Party!**
It's time to RSVP for [T](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1e7f977d8b&e=1acd9bb3d6)[eam Holcomb's annual G.O.Party](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=292570ae25&e=1acd9bb3d6)! This exciting event will take place one week from today -- **Wednesday, August 28th** \-- at the **Dallara IndyCar Factory** in Speedway! We'd love to see you come out, support **Governor Holcomb** and your Indiana Republican Party, and network with fellow Republicans.

While there are a dozen reasons why you should attend this big event -- below are our top 5 reasons:

**1\. Celebrate!**
Indiana is on a roll under Republican leadership, which means it's time to **celebrate**! Hoosier Republicans' hard work is paying off and it's time to come together and celebrate the good news and hard work we've all put in!

**2\. Spend the Evening with Governor Eric Holcomb and Chairman Kyle Hupfer!**
Get excited! This is your opportunity to hear directly from Governor Holcomb and Chairman Hupfer! Governor Holcomb is all about Putting People First, which includes hearing from Republicans like you at the annual G.O.Party! He's eager to see you there!

**3. Visit the Dallara IndyCar Factory in Speedway!**
We know that motorsports play a huge role in being a Hoosier. Indiana has a strong history of auto racing AND Republican leadership, so what better place to celebrate and network than the Dallara IndyCar Factory!? This is a must-see for all Hoosiers.

**4\. Dance, Eat, and Drink!**
Aside from spending the evening at in the Dallara IndyCar Factory with fellow Hoosier Republicans including Governor Holcomb, you'll also be able to enjoy live music from the local band Password Reset, snacks, and drinks! Networking, music, drinks, and snacks -- what more could you ask for?

**5\. Support!**
There's no better way to show your support than attending our annual G.O.Party! Our Republican success would not be possible without the support of fellow Republicans like you. In order for us to keep the momentum going, we ask you continue to show your support for both the Republican Party and Governor Holcomb!

With all that being said,
**[\-- >>RSVP Now for Team Holcomb's Annual ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=52cda4c81b&e=1acd9bb3d6)****[G.O.Party](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=acfa7bb58d&e=1acd9bb3d6)[! <<\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1ac8e2c5c9&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

We're eager to see you there, so [RSVP](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=190edce070&e=1acd9bb3d6) now!

-Team Holcomb
---
|
---

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: ↘↘ waiting for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS [Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9252681/90925657/368741054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmY1MmZmZC00N2M0LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nZZJHgzlbMTACd5qME4-EYOKTXC54BVKs9X92jZC9Nw=)

| | | | Peter,

In the first half of the year, I've supported legislation to protect people with pre-existing conditions, ensure women receive equal pay for equal work, expand criminal background checks for gun purchases, and proposed bipartisan legislation to combat climate change and cut taxes.

But before I head back to Washington after the August recess, I need to hear from my supporters. I need to know which issue is most important to you so I can make it a priority in Washington.
[**Which issues are most important to you? name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Tlaib, Omar All About Weakening Israel, They Stay Silent on Hamas, Palestinian Authority
body:
"Their latest PR stunt is an attempt to victimize themselves, whitewash history and spin reality." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9cc5f10230&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Tlaib, Omar All About Weakening Israel, They Stay Silent on Hamas, Palestinian Authority**

“It should come as no shock that Democratic Reps. Ilhan Omar of Minnesota and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan are unwelcome in Israel, a nation they are taking great pains to tear down. Their latest PR stunt is an attempt to victimize themselves, whitewash history and spin reality – providing even further proof of their worst of intentions,” Rep. Lee Zeldin (R-NY) writes in Fox News.

“The two congresswomen attack Israel while remaining silent on Hamas using women and children as human shields, denying humanitarian aid to its own people, calling jihad an obligation, and launching rockets into Israel that kill innocent civilians.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4f58166bdf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Both heroin and prescription drug abuse dropped last year, “a bright signal of hope” in confronting one of our country’s most devastating problems, Cassidy Morrison reports for the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f40563085&e=3ee4985eea)_. The number of Americans misusing opioids fell by more than 1 million—a “significant decrease,” according to Assistant Secretary for Mental Health and Substance Use Dr. Elinore F. McCance-Katz.
---
|
---
| “For more than two years, the editors at [_The New York Times_] produced hundreds of weak articles pushing a story they claimed was solid as a rock: President Trump and his campaign coterie colluded with Russia to alter the outcome of the 2016 election,” Joseph Curl writes in _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7ba886e67&e=3ee4985eea)_. With that story dead, _The New York Times’_ editors now openly admit they’re moving on to a new narrative. “Hey, it doesn’t have to be true — the Russia collusion canard wasn’t. But clearly, the once-great New York Times isn’t going to let a pesky thing like facts get in the way of a good story.”
---
|
---
| “Activists and Democratic politicians like to portray President Donald Trump’s withdrawal from the ineffectual and counterproductive Paris Agreement as an example of his ‘inaction’ on the environment,” former EPA official Mandy Gunasekara writes in _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92c6421998&e=3ee4985eea)_. “In reality, the quality of our air and water has only improved since he took office. Carbon emissions fell 2.7% in President Trump’s first year. While emissions rose in 2018 due to robust economic growth, carbon dioxide is projected to decrease in 2019 and 2020.”
---
|
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a0d57b8cd0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9bf0033b34&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a34045467a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Never ever write anyone off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
I went to a gun show the other day. As soon as I walk in, a guy says, “Hey are you Beto? I’m a fan.” That was the last thing I expected to hear at a gun show.
#
I went to a gun show the other day. As soon as I walk in, a guy says, “Hey are you Beto? I’m a fan.” That was the last thing I expected to hear at a gun show.
He invited us to see his booth, where he was selling AR-15s. Before we walked over I said, “I’ll be honest with you, part of the reason I’m here is because I’m concerned about gun violence, that we lose 40,000 people a year. I want to listen to everyone on this. So I came here to listen to you. Tell me what you think. How do we fix this?”
I kid you not, the next words out of his mouth shocked me. He said he should not be allowed to sell weapons because he is not required to conduct a background check at gun shows. But he goes on to tell me that if you’re 18-years-old, can prove it, and have a pulse, he’ll sell you a gun. And then he says he doesn’t think that’s right. Even though he’s profiting from this current system, he knows the current system is broken.
Another guy, a Trump voter, tells me he has an assault weapon, and says he doesn’t know if it will do any good, but he would be willing to turn that weapon in if it’s better for this country. I was floored. Here are two guys literally at a show telling me we should close the gun show loophole, have universal background checks, and do something about assault weapons.
One of the things we learned from the Senate race in Texas was how important it is to not write anyone off. No matter where they live, who they voted for in the last election, how red or blue their county is. Never write anyone off.
That’s why we just traveled to some of the forgotten states in the Democratic primary: Mississippi, Arkansas, Oklahoma, Kansas, and Missouri. We’re going to run everywhere. We’re not ceding an inch to Donald Trump.
I believe that if we do that, we will not only win the presidency in 2020, we will win it in a landslide. Democrats can take on Republicans, and win, in places we didn’t even think we could compete. And in doing so, we can bring this country back together again. But we have to build a campaign big enough to reach all these places and people, and to do that I need your help.
[Can you make a $3 donation now to help us take this campaign everywhere? Your contributions help us show up, no matter how red or blue the state.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27068?refcode=ema20190821-50281&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=50281%2E444211%2EFVV1cH)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27068?refcode=ema20190821-50281&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=50281%2E444211%2EFVV1cH)**
I’ll close with this... last February, we’re walking through Archer City on our way to a town hall at Murn’s Cafe. This is a county that voted 89% for Donald Trump. A man walks up to me on the street and says, “Hey Beto, I want to show you this.”
And then out of a manilla envelope, he pulls a picture of his dad with Lyndon B. Johnson. It was shot in Archer City in 1948. LBJ had landed in a helicopter in front of the courthouse, and attended a reception at the American Legion Hall down the street. His dad’s the skinny guy, fifth from the left in the photo
As far as he knew, 1948 was the last time a Senate candidate had ever stepped foot in Archer City. Until we came along.
We are so quick to write off the “red counties” as too red, or to take so-called “blue counties” for granted. In Texas, we showed up everywhere and earned more votes than any Democrat in Texas history. We won Independents for the first time in years. Nearly half a million Republicans voted for a Republican governor on one part of the ballot, and us on the other part. And we never had to trim our sails or say anything other than what we really believed. That’s how we finally won places that had long voted Republican — like Tarrant County where Trump won by nine but, two years later, we won. Or in Williamson County where Trump won by 10 but we won by three, swinging it 13 points!
Imagine if we did the same across America. It would transform the political map, and transform our country.
I truly believe that in 2020 there will be states in play that we could not have imagined before. I know for a fact Texas will be in play, and we’re going to win it. But the only way we can build a campaign that’s big enough, inclusive enough, and ambitious enough is with your help.
[Please make a $3 contribution today. Every dollar you invest helps us stay on the road, and reach people in other ways.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27068?refcode=ema20190821-50281&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=50281%2E444211%2EFVV1cH)
I want to keep doing this the right way — not with PACs, corporations, or lobbyists. Just meeting the people that I want to represent and serve. Whether we’re in Mississippi or Arkansas, New York or Austin, I am going to keep showing up if you’ll keep giving me the chance to do it.
This is how we win.
Sincerely,
Beto
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27068?refcode=ema20190821-50281&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=50281%2E444211%2EFVV1cH)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=50281%2E444211%2EFVV1cH). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Warren HQ
subject: You might be in the audience for the next debate

name: SENATE WIN (via Team Ben Ray)
subject: Mitch McConnell DEFEATED
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | BREAKING: Democrats erase McConnell's lead, could finally unseat him after 30 years This is absolutely unprecedented. Nate Silver's 538 reports Mitch McConnell is now in danger of losing his seat. **For the first time in 30 years, Democrats could finally unseat Mitch McConnell --_and his entire Senate._** We cannot mess this up. body:

---

| | Republicans know that our grassroots campaign to defeat John Katko and the special interests he works for is gaining momentum.

That's why one of their most well-funded super PACs has already deployed a staffer to follow me as I campaign and try to catch me in an embarrassing moment.

Dark money funded groups like America Rising will do anything to stop me from defeating their representative, John Katko. That's why I need your help.

[**We need to raise $5,500 by tomorrow at midnight to have what it takes to push back against escalating attacks from dark money Republican super PACs. name: Dan Baer
subject: NPR just reported:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Senate Republicans are rebelling against Mitch McConnell's agenda.
|
---

| | I just learned 3 critical pieces of information.

\-- Mitch McConnell is within a few points of losing his re-election.
\-- NPR just reported that Senate Republicans are rebelling against his agenda.
\-- This is our best chance to oust McConnell from his seat and win the entire Senate for Democrats!

That's why I keep emailing and asking for money.

name: The Markey Campaign
subject: refresh... refresh...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| We were getting worried. After we reached out this morning, we kept refreshing our ActBlue account, hoping to see the donations coming in.

But for a while...**NOTHING!**

Then all of a sudden, BOOM! Donations from Democrats started pouring in!

_**[Now, we're only 188 donations away from getting back on track for this week's $25,000 goal. Will you step up and support Ed's campaign with $27 or more before midnight?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Ed is counting on you. Read more below to see how our momentum is growing:
* * *
Hello,

We have some good news and some not-so-good news.

**Good news first:** The majority of Massachusetts' Members of Congress are backing Ed Markey's re-election campaign, including Elizabeth Warren! Ed is proud to have the support of his colleagues who are dedicated to fighting for Massachusetts families.

**Okay, now for the bad news:** We were certain we would see a spike in our fundraising, but after crunching the numbers, we're already really behind our $25,000 goal.

_**[So all of us at Team Ed Markey are making this urgent request to you: Will you pitch in $27 or more to have Ed's back and keep him fighting for us in the Senate?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

President Trump and the RNC are raising mountains of right-wing cash. **They raised more than DOUBLE what Democrats raised last month!**

That money will make its way into Senate races like Ed's to fund relentless attacks.

That's why we're boosting our fundraising into overdrive this week and asking for your direct help.

_**[Will you pitch in $27 to support Ed and help us reach our $25,000 goal this week?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: _

_**[Donate $10 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=EM-082119_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $27 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=EM-082119_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $50 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EM-082119_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $100 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM-082119_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $250 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EM-082119_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Team Cory
subject: Want to join Cory at the next debate? Flight and lodging on us!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, **The next debate in Houston will be a huge moment for our campaign -- and you could witness it in person.[Chip in and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win a ticket for you and a friend to be Cory's guest at the next debate -- flight and lodging on us!](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190821-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190821_BHQ_20190821-fr-BHQ-debatecontest-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** From the talking heads on TV to grassroots activists online, people have been buzzing about Cory's performance in the first two debates. It's supporters like you who helped Cory earn his spot in the next debate. That's a big reason we wanted to offer up the opportunity to be there in person to watch him take the stage to share his vision with the country. There's a lot to look forward to, and we're betting that Cory's going to do us proud. So friend, throw your name in the hat to come see him shine in person -- **[donate now and you'll be automatically entered.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190821-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190821_BHQ_20190821-fr-BHQ-debatecontest-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Hope to see you there,
Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190821-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190821_BHQ_20190821-fr-BHQ-debatecontest-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by August 31, 2019. Enter by[contributing here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0890/5fca0d19/70c4e650/29191e0e/3050204532/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190821-houstondebatecontest") or [click here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0890/5fca0d19/70c4e650/29191e0d/3050204532/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/Houston-Debate") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Houston, Texas; one-night hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; opportunity to attend the third DNC Presidential Debate (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules at [https://corybooker.com/dncdebatecontest/](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0890/5fca0d19/70c4e650/29191e0c/3050204532/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/dncdebatecontest/"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0890/5fca0d19/70c4e650/29191e0a/3050204532/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0890/5fca0d19/70c4e650/29191e09/3050204532/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0890/5fca0d19/70c4e650/29191e08/3050204532/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0890/5fca0d19/70c4e650/29191e17/3050204532/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: ICYMI: 500 Words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bill Bryant**
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | In April 2018, at the suggestion of several supporters, I emailed my first “500 Words”, an update of what I’m up to and thinking about, and said I’d do it again if enough people wanted me to. Scores of you responded “yes”, so I sent a second one that October, and people asked me to keep ‘em coming. No. 3 was sent in January. Here’s No. 4. [You can access previous editions here.](https://twitter.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c5ac11f23df6ef9dfb9e604c5&id=b2cd7da3ee&e=ef726ca89e)

You are receiving this because at some point you were identified as a supporter, someone who wants to keep in touch, or you asked to be added to the list. If you know somebody who would like to receive this, have them email me at [billbryantwa@gmail.com](mailto:billbryantwa@gmail.com). If you want to unsubscribe, please click the unsubscribe link at the bottom.
---
| |
## **WHAT I'M UP TO
AND THINKING ABOUT**
---
| It’s summer! For me, that’s meant sailing, boating, paddle boarding, fishing, cycling, hiking.

I just came off a fantastic hike in the North Cascades. A climbing buddy I hadn’t seen in nine years called, said he was coming to town, wanted to get back up into the hills. “How’d nine years pass without us seeing each other, Dan?”, I asked. “Well,” he called back from in front of me on the trail, “I had three kids and you went off to save the world”. Our friendship and teamwork picked up as if our last climb had been only weeks before.
---
|
---
---
| Friends are the community we build around ourselves & our family. Through different and shared values & goals we touch each other’s lives.

My mentor told me before he died, “At the end of your life, all the stuff you’ve been able to buy won’t matter.... the only things that will matter are the lives you’ve touched and the community you’ve built.”

Friends are one of our communities.

Strengthening our state’s broader community (helping kids learn, fixing our traffic mess, protecting our public lands, watersheds, salmon runs, orca and Puget Sound, making government work better) is why I ran for governor. Doing those things requires pulling together people who have different values and goals. That’s why I’m disgusted with politicians who divide us.

What’s troublesome, is that all the divisive rhetoric seems to work. Too many of the most politically active folks in both parties I talk with across Washington, are motivated by anger, fear and demonizing others. Too many believe those who quietly pull people together and compromise are weak. From my experience in public office, the opposite is true. Some of the squishiest or laziest elected officials are those who loudly divide people and refuse to compromise.

Some of their supporters think that’s courageous, but it’s not. Courage is entering the arena already knowing what criticism will come. Only those tough and courageous enough to take arrows from both their own and the other side, listen, then quietly pull people together. Negotiating with opponents while defending one’s core values, taking a position you know will tick-off some friends and supporters, takes guts, requires conviction, isn’t for the squishy or lazy. Pulling people together is a democratic community’s glue. Those who pull people together and build community are real leaders.

But enough seriousness. It’s sunny. Let’s get outside and play.

---
| |

subject: See what President Trump is doing to defend and protect America’s veterans
body:
"Thank you, America’s loudest, toughest patriots . . . You are special people." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6744af545c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 21, 2019
---
| | |
# **See what President Trump is doing to defend and protect America’s veterans**
---
| **“Thank you,** America’s loudest, toughest patriots,” President Donald J. Trump told veterans this afternoon in Kentucky. “We love our veterans . . . You are special people.”

**President Trump** addressed the American Veterans 75th National Convention today, an event that coincides with his latest action to protect our heroes in uniform. Just hours ago, the President signed a memorandum that ensures permanently disabled veterans obtain the federal student loan debt discharges to which they are entitled.

**Only half** of the roughly 50,000 disabled veterans who are qualified to have these loans discharged have received this hard-earned benefit. Fortunately, that will soon change.

**🎬** **President Trump:**[Thank you for honoring our heroes and great American flag!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12ab356558&e=3ee4985eea)

**America’s veterans** should never have to go the extra mile to receive the benefits and services they are rightfully owed for their sacrifice. These brave men and women proudly served our nation. Now, it’s time for our government to serve them fairly, as well.

**President Trump** has worked since his Inauguration Day to reform the federal bureaucracy, making it more responsive to veterans’ needs and less fixated on its own interests. In 2017, he signed the Forever GI Bill into law, allowing individuals to access their veteran educational benefits at any point in during their lifetimes.

**Also in 2017** , he signed the VA Accountability and Whistleblower Protection Act into law, making it easier to hold failing VA employees accountable for their actions. Since then, the VA has fired more than 7,600 employees who have failed our veterans. Even more important, it has instituted reforms to increase efficiency and decrease abuse.

**As a result** , VA healthcare today is significantly better than when President Trump was elected, with trust in VA outpatient healthcare now close to 90 percent.

**The story of the American veteran** —the “American warrior,” as President Trump says—is “the story of the American nation. You have written our history, shaped our identity, forged our destiny, marched us to glory, and always planted the righteous flag of American victory,” he said today.

**“You have filled** **our enemies** with dread. You have filled our friends with hope. And you have filled our American heart with fierce patriotic pride. Because of you, America is safe.”

[See what President Trump is doing to defend and protect America’s veterans.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a178d3bd00&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** **Watch:**[Thanks to you, veterans, America is the mightiest nation on Earth!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d401d11ad1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **America cracks down on powerful drug fentanyl**

**Today, the Trump Administration** announced new actions to crack down on international fentanyl trafficking and protect the American homeland from this horribly lethal drug.

**“Deadly synthetic opioids** like fentanyl continue to take the lives of tens of thousands of Americans every year,” White House Office of National Drug Control Policy Director Jim Carroll said. “To reverse this trend, we are cracking down on drug traffickers more than ever before.”

**Even as drug overdose deaths** are declining for the first time in nearly 30 years, a flood of fatal fentanyl is washing over America, Senior Counselor to the President Kellyanne Conway said. “Last year alone, federal agents seized enough fentanyl to kill every American man, woman, and child four times.”

**President Trump** is giving American law enforcement more tools than ever before to cut off these illegal drug supplies and protect our communities from these monsters.

**This morning** , for example, the Treasury Department announced it has identified two Chinese nationals and a China-based Drug Trafficking Organization as significant foreign narcotics traffickers pursuant to the Foreign Narcotics Kingpin Designation Act.

[White House announces actions to crack down on fentanyl trafficking.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=221fac0c7a&e=3ee4985eea)

**See America’s stories:** [How the “crisis next door” affects each of us](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a729f95bb6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day

Stand With Mark Kelly is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55.
For 2020, we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating Trump and turning Arizona blue. We recruited astronaut Mark Kelly to run for Arizona's US Senate seat, are working to win a key Arizona Congressional seat and to flip both houses of the Arizona State Legislature.
If you'd like to support the Stand With Mark Kelly Campaign, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472d/4bd7760e/4e46a612/77e60e1f/3787658225/VEsHDA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footerdmk?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=19+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190821_KellyBillboard_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190821_KellyBillboard_U1_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb472d/4bd7760e/4e46a612/77e60e1e/3787658225/VEsEBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=20+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190821_KellyBillboard_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190821_KellyBillboard_U1_X1")

| | Peter, Cory Booker has a warning that you NEED to hear about before 2020. Robert Mueller and intelligence experts confirmed that Russian agents used social media in a coordinated effort to suppress African American voters in 2016.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter, Cory Booker has a warning that you NEED to hear before 2020: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06f2/72412298/40732227/6102ff13/3080407984/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfYXVndXN0X21vbnRobHkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDgyMV9jb3J5Ym9va2VyX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzeU5YMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_august_monthly?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190821_corybooker_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190821_corybooker_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190821_corybooker_U1_X1") Robert Mueller and intelligence experts confirmed that Russian agents used social media in a coordinated effort to suppress African American voters in 2016. **But Russia wasn 't working alone. **Republican legislators in Michigan did everything they could to suppress minority voters. [**Michigan was critical to Trump 's victory, and it's key to his path to re-election. Trump won Michigan by fewer than 11,000 votes -- **his slimmest margin of victory in any state.**
And election experts agree that voter suppression resulted in low turnout among college students, African Americans, and Latinos -- groups that overwhelmingly support Democrats -- by the _**hundreds of thousands**_.
**Voter suppression in a single state can decide an entire election.**
_We have to stop them._ [**Will you join us to fight tooth and nail across the nation to stop racist efforts to strip minority groups of their fundamental right to vote?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06f2/72412298/40732227/6102ff1b/3080407984/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfYXVndXN0X21vbnRobHkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDgyMV9jb3J5Ym9va2VyX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzeU5YMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_august_monthly?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190821_corybooker_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+join+us+to+fight+tooth+and+nail&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190821_corybooker_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190821_corybooker_U1_X1")
| | [Donate](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06f2/72412298/40732227/6102ff1a/3080407984/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfYXVndXN0X21vbnRobHkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDgyMV9jb3J5Ym9va2VyX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzeU5YMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_august_monthly?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190821_corybooker_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+Donate&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190821_corybooker_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190821_corybooker_U1_X1")
---
If we don't act now, we'll be handing Trump a win in 2020.
\-- Voter Protection Project

name: Tim
subject: I believe in us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Team,

I'll keep it short because it's getting late and you're winding down your day.

My team tells me that our polling numbers are going up, but not at the pace we need them if we want to qualify for the Houston debates. We are nearing that 2% threshold -- but nearing is not near enough.

[**That 's why we need your help. Your contribution gets our message to more people and bumps us up in the polls. Can you contribute $25 today?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_2_2&amount=25&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+your+help+Your+co&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_2_2")

I want to keep travelling, spreading our message, and challenging the Democratic field to take up the critical issues: protecting access to health care, helping union workers, making sure our hard working communities aren't forgotten, [**but this means I need your support to help me reach the upcoming debates.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_2_2&amount=25&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+but+this+means+I+need+your+support+to+he&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_2_2")

I believe in you, team -- you've never once given me a reason not to!

-Tim

|

Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! [**Donate now.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9dfd/5486deaa/3d034157/dc8cbff/392538582/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-emfooter?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Donate+now&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_2_2&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190821_2_2")

| Sorry to email you again -- we wouldn't do it if it wasn't absolutely crucial.

We'll keep this short: [ will you chip in $5 to Michael's presidential campaign?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac75/134673f2/ce9798e/69964144/884271529/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_082119_AC_ND_RS&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

We know that some people have been betting against Michael since he first announced.

But this campaign's success has surprised them all, and we aren't slowing down.

[Since the last debate, donations for Michael have exploded, but as of right now, he's still falling short of the DNC's 130,000 donor threshold to qualify for the fall debates.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac75/134673f2/ce9798e/69964144/884271529/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_082119_AC_ND_RS&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Team Weld
subject: more crazy tweets...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzL0kZfp2LfgsUZ44_7lcws&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190821_fr&n=1) Friend — When we saw this _New York Magazine_ headline we thought it was satire. Then we saw the tweets. . . [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzL0kZfp2LfgsUZ44_7lcws&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190821_fr&n=2) Putting aside the fact that he is up at 4:30 in the morning tweeting — President Trump is quoting a known conspiracy theorist who claims that Israelis love him like he’s _**“the King of Israel.”**_ Let that sink in for a moment. Now tell us — **does this seem like the “stable genius” we want to run our military, run our government, and run our economy for another four years?** We don’t think so either. [**Can you help build the grassroots movement we need to beat Donald Trump in 2020 by donating $20.20 to our campaign today?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzL0kZfp2LfgsUZ44_7lcws&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190821_fr&n=3) — Team Weld | | [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzyNJj_s9zZ47XSjnE12v-k&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190821_fr&n=4)
---
